title: AML Alerts Reconciliation Procedure
body_markdown:
**Title**: AML Alerts Reconciliation Procedure (V2)
**Regulation Scope**: ASIC, CySEC, FCA, FinCEN, FSA, FSRA, MAS
**Status**: Active
**Owner**: Konstantinos Aznaouridis

## Scope

AML Alerts Reconciliation ensures alerts are completely and accurately recorded, tracked,
and aligned across the relevant systems and working files. Verifies that all alerts have
been added correctly to the working file and that their status matches the status in the
TM system. Identifies alerts where the related ticket has been closed but the alert
remains open.

No table refs in body. Created Apr 2026 (very recent).
